=> 1024, 'min' => 0, 'pattern' => 's3://.*(/|\\.zip|\\.ZIP)', ], 'PerformanceStatsConfiguration' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'SharedWithClient' => [ 'shape' => 'Boolean', ], ], ], 'Protocol' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'WebRTC', ], ], 'RemoveStreamGroupLocationsInput' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'Identifier', 'Locations', ], 'members' => [ 'Identifier'
